Bash(powershell -command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$path = 'E:/Portofolio - Vercel/mi-portfolio/public/images/Imagenes fondo/hf_20260322_165652_0cd2acd4-f7c7-4122-a7e9-1da5ab070cff \(1\).png'
\\$img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\\$path\)
\\$w = \\$img.Width
\\$h = \\$img.Height
\\$r = [math]::Round\(\\$w/\\$h, 2\)
Write-Output \\"\\$w x \\$h ratio=\\$r\\"
\\$img.Dispose\(\)
")

Bash(powershell -command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$folder = 'E:/Portofolio - Vercel/mi-portfolio/public/images/Odyssey'
Get-ChildItem \\$folder -Filter '*.png' | ForEach-Object {
  \\$img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\\$_.FullName\)
  Write-Output \(\\$_.Name + ': ' + \\$img.Width + 'x' + \\$img.Height\)
  \\$img.Dispose\(\)
}
")

Bash(powershell -command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$folder = 'E:/Portofolio - Vercel/mi-portfolio/public/images/Craftd'
Get-ChildItem \\$folder -Include '*.png','*.jpg','*.jpeg' -Recurse | ForEach-Object {
  \\$img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\\$_.FullName\)
  Write-Output \(\\$_.Name + ': ' + \\$img.Width + 'x' + \\$img.Height\)
  \\$img.Dispose\(\)
}
")
